title: AI Transformation & Operations Lead
summary: Embedded directly within the Claims organization, you will serve as the bridge between operational reality and technological capability. You will work in close partnership with Technology teams to extend the impact of existing tools and identify new opportunities that require technical development or integration. You will ensure that AI systems and our claims talent work seamlessly together—delivering measurable outcomes and building a more adaptive, data-driven operating model.
why_match: Role involves bridging operational reality and technological capability, suggesting a focus on transformation
Works closely with technology teams to extend tools and identify new technical opportunities
Position is remote, which is preferred
concerns: Role is embedded within the Claims organization, indicating a focus on a single business function
Unclear if the role involves enterprise-wide platform transformation or operating model redesign across multiple teams/systems
AI focus is more on operational integration rather than large-scale system modernization or governance

title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
why_match: Role is focused on enterprise platform transformation by harmonizing disparate systems into a unified financial infrastructure platform
Strong emphasis on backend systems and API-first mindset aligns with platform infrastructure expertise
Cross-functional leadership and architecting control planes address system modernization and operating model improvement at scale
Remote work with a high-leverage team and strategic impact on Stripe's revenue platform
Involves large-scale system consolidation across billing, financial data warehouses, and seller systems
concerns: Role somewhat embedded in the financial product context but clearly spans multiple teams and systems
AI mention is minimal and doesn't dominate the role, which is good but AI alignment not a strong factor

title: Strategy & Operations Program Manager, Risk Ops
why_match: Role involves leading complex global programs and high-impact strategic initiatives within Risk Operations, indicating experience with enterprise-wide operational improvements
Strong emphasis on cross-functional collaboration with multiple teams including Risk Product, Risk Engineering, Policy, and Data Science, suggesting broad organizational impact
Focus on operational excellence at scale and designing step-change improvements which aligns with platform transformation and modernization goals
Position is fully remote, which aligns with preferred remote roles
concerns: Primary focus is within Risk Operations, which may be considered somewhat embedded in a single business function rather than full enterprise platform transformation
Role emphasizes operational processes and risk user experience improvement, but lacks explicit mention of large-scale system modernization, platform consolidation, or governance transformation
Job summary is cut off, limiting clarity on full scope of responsibilities
No clear indication this is a contract role, likely full-time, and not explicitly favoring contract preference

title: AI Delivery Lead
summary: HMH’s Content Solutions Team is accelerating the integration of AI and automation across content development to improve speed, quality, consistency, and cost efficiency. The AI Delivery Lead coordinates and manages the adoption, utilization, and operational integration of AI/automation capabilities across NWEA’s products, state programs, and formative solutions. This role leads the organization and governance of AI initiatives, coordinates pilots, evaluates new capabilities, and develops SOPs/ guidelines. Additionally, this role supports the communication, training, and adoption of these initiatives across the division. The AI Delivery Lead also aligns AI/automation plans with capacity, sequencing, and agile practices to ensure predictable delivery and measurable impact.
why_match: Role involves managing the adoption and integration of AI/automation capabilities across multiple products and programs, indicating enterprise-wide transformation.
Focus on governance, coordination, SOP/guideline development aligns with operating model redesign and platform modernization.
Remote position, which fits preferred work location.
Responsibilities include sequencing and capacity planning with agile practices indicating senior delivery leadership rather than junior or purely customer-facing work.
concerns: The role is focused on AI delivery and content solutions which may limit the scope of platform transformation to NWEA’s products and related systems rather than a broader enterprise-wide transformation.

title: Credit Risk Program Manager, Risk Foundations
why_match: Role involves driving program and process incubation within a critical credit risk pillar and the broader risk organization, indicating enterprise-wide impact.
Focus on designing and implementing scalable risk-wide frameworks and foundational policies aligns with platform modernization and governance.
Cross-functional collaboration with Strategy, Product, Engineering, and Operations aligns well with large-scale system modernization and operating model redesign.
Remote role with significant execution and strategic planning responsibilities matches candidate's preference for remote, enterprise transformation work.
concerns: Role is heavily embedded in the credit risk domain which could be seen as single business function focused, but the description emphasizes enterprise-wide frameworks and scalability.

title: Product Manager, Banking as a Service
why_match: Role involves ownership of core APIs and platform products, which aligns with platform transformation and system modernization.
Involves collaboration across multiple internal teams (engineering, design, legal, risk, compliance), indicating cross-functional impact beyond a single business function.
Remote work option is available, which is preferred.
Focus on delivering scalable, performant financial services products with complex integration, supporting platform modernization.
concerns: Role is heavily focused on product management of Banking as a Service, which is domain-specific (financial products) and might limit broader enterprise-wide transformation scope.

Strong emphasis on user experience, customer feedback, and sales collaboration might indicate some customer-facing and go-to-market responsibilities rather than pure platform governance or transformation.
Does not explicitly describe enterprise-wide platform consolidation, governance, or operating model redesign at a large scale.
